title: nepeta subintegra
intro: Nepeta subintegra, also known as dwarf catmint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family and native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, making it effective in treating digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Nepeta subintegra include its ability to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Nepeta subintegra can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
